concerns: POST /workers handler is ~330 lines inline in Bun.serve closure — needs refactoring to extract shared handleWorkerCreate() for advance to reuse
GitHub issueId format is ambiguous for repos with hyphens — advance handler should use cachedState.source (canonical owner/repo/number) not issueId parsing
Linear backend cannot do mutations via daemon CLI (needs MCP) — stubs throw explicitly, advance only fully works with GitHub backend initially
ServerOptions currently lacks issueBackend field — must be added and wired through from DaemonConfig
Envoy fast path for auto-progression is best-effort — daemon may not have established Envoy connection patterns yet, health tick fallback is primary mechanism
workflowRecommendation: Standard pipeline — all phases needed. Medium complexity, single implementer. POST /workers refactoring is the highest-risk step.
